title: Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu — Chapter 1087
main_description: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 144 cleaned dialogue lines.
